Portfolio

Work that speaks

Every project is built for speed, SEO, and conversions. Here's a look at what I've done for businesses like yours.

My Work

Sites that perform

Luxe Nail Studio
Beauty & Wellness

Luxe Nail Studio

Complete rebrand and website build for a premium nail studio. 5-page site with online booking integration.

340% increase in online bookings
Iron & Blade Barbershop
Barbershop

Iron & Blade Barbershop

Bold, high-energy single-page site with service menu, gallery, and booking system.

First page Google ranking in 6 weeks
Balance Studio
Yoga & Pilates

Balance Studio

Clean, calming multi-page site with class schedule, instructor bios, and student testimonials.

200+ new student sign-ups in 3 months
GroundWork Coffee
Café & Restaurant

GroundWork Coffee

Fast, minimal site with menu, hours, location, and Instagram integration.

2x foot traffic from Google Maps
Client Love

What my clients say

"Our old website was embarrassing. Karan built us something that looks like we spent $20K. Online bookings tripled in the first month."

MR
Maria RosalesLuxe Nail Studio, LA

"I was paying $300/month for a Squarespace site that loaded in 6 seconds. Now I pay $149 for a site that loads in 0.3 seconds and I'm on page 1 of Google."

MC
Marcus ColeIron & Blade Barbershop

"He finished the whole site in 10 days. I was expecting months. The quality is insane — I've sent him 4 referrals already."

LC
Lila ChenBalance Studio, Santa Monica
